---
title: "The Comparison between Different Extracellular Vesicle Isolation Methods by AFM-IR Nanospectroscopy"
date: 2026-03-24
author:
  - name: Da Silva, Jéssica Verônica
  - name: Berenguel, Otávio
  - name: Neres-Santos, Raquel Silva
  - name: Martinho, Herculano Da Silva
  - name: Carneiro-Ramos, Marcela Sorelli
abstract: > 
  Resumo não disponível.
categories: [article]
citation: 
  container-title: "Analytical Chemistry"
  volume: 98
  issue: 11
  doi: "10.1021/acs.analchem.5c07289"
---

```{=html}
<nav aria-label="breadcrumb">
  <ol class="breadcrumb">
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../../index.html">Home</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../index.html">Publicações</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item active" aria-current="page">The Comparison between Different Extracellular Vesicle Isolation Methods by AFM-IR Nanospectroscopy</li>
  </ol>
</nav>
